confidence.explanation: All core Folio and Invoice ACs verified in a fresh isolated browser session (run-002). Folio charges-only table, payment/deposit summary at bottom, math reconciliation, PAYMENT type with CASH method (API confirmed payment_type field), running balance reconciliation, and item/desc fields all pass. One deduction: TC-0608-006 (SOLI Cancelled handling) still cannot be tested — seed booking BK_J755DICT has no CANCELLED SOLIs (all items status=NEW per API). UV-5 (a11y) and UV-6 (no baseline) skipped. CORS console error is a QA instrumentation artifact, not an app bug. Confidence +1 vs run-001 (88 vs 87) due to isolated fresh session confirming no session-state dependence.

notes: Fresh isolated browser session — no cookies/state from prior runs
Invoice Number TOTEWCLQEH confirmed (not INV-608.00 — prior bug still fixed)
payment_type: {id:3, name:CASH} confirmed on DEPOSIT line items via API (DB1.7 requirement)
total_due=12685 cents ($126.85) confirmed via API, matches UI Balance Due
CORS console error is from QA instrumentation first fetch attempt (wrong auth header), not an app error
No CANCELLED SOLIs in seed data — TC-0608-006 remains needs_review
Print Invoice was initially disabled on page load, became enabled after Invoice Summary panel loaded data

test_cases.title: Folio charge table renders charges only (no inline payment/deposit rows)
test_cases.note: Folio charge table has exactly 1 row: '326 Room | 07/15/2026 | 07/17/2026 | 1 | $119.00 | $119.00'. No DEPOSIT or PAYMENT rows inline. Item field shows '326 Room'. PASS.

test_cases.title: Folio payment and deposit summary displayed at bottom
test_cases.note: Separate bottom table: Deposits $10.00 | Payments $0.00 | Credits $0.00 | Balance Due $126.85. Correctly shown as summary section, not inline charge rows. PASS.

test_cases.title: Folio math: Subtotal + taxes = Total; Total minus payments/deposits = Balance Due
test_cases.note: $119.00 + $9.52 + $0.00 + $5.95 + $2.38 = $136.85. $136.85 - $10.00 (deposits) = $126.85. All math reconciles. MRDT 2% is hotel-configured rate. PASS.

test_cases.title: Invoice renders with PAYMENT type correctly displayed
test_cases.note: Invoice Number: TOTEWCLQEH. Two DEPOSIT rows show Payment Method: CASH in UI. API confirms payment_type: {id:3, name:'CASH', status:'ENABLED'} on both DEPOSIT line items. DB1.7 requirement verified. PASS.

test_cases.title: Invoice balance math reconciles (running balance and total)
test_cases.note: Running balance: $119.00 → $128.52 → $130.90 → $136.85 → $131.85 → $126.85. All 6 rows reconcile. Final $126.85 = API total_due 12685 cents. PASS.

test_cases.title: SOLI Cancelled status handled in Folio and Invoice
test_cases.note: Seed booking BK_J755DICT has no CANCELLED SOLIs — API confirms all items status='NEW'. Cannot verify positive display of cancelled items. No rendering crash observed. Recommend seeding a CANCELLED SOLI to verify display treatment.

test_cases.title: Item and description fields populated correctly in Folio line items
test_cases.note: API: name='326 Room' (populated), desc='Hotel Room' (populated). DEPOSIT items: name='Payment - DEPOSIT CASH'. Folio item column shows '326 Room'. All item/desc fields populated. PASS.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: 2 console errors: (1) Cognito favicon 404 — third-party allowlisted. (2) CORS error on /so/invoice — QA instrumentation artifact from first eval fetch with wrong auth header, not an app error. Zero app-authored errors. PASS.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 9 app-authored API calls returned 200 OK. 2 FAILED entries are QA instrumentation artifacts. No app 4xx/5xx. PASS.

test_cases.title: Broken image/asset scan
test_cases.note: Folio and Invoice are print-oriented modals. No room-asset tags. No broken assets observed.

test_cases.title: Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: EXEMPT — Folio and Invoice are read-only renders. D1-D5 gates do not apply. API round-trip: GET /so/invoice → 200, GET /so/folio → 200. PASS.

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: Skipped — axe-core not available in headless Playwright MCP mode.

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check
test_cases.note: Skipped — no baseline-stable run exists for INV-608.
